summary: Iteration 60: Edge and resolution-time data fix for position lifecycle system VERIFIED. Bug fix confirmed working - before fix all positions had edge_at_entry=0, current_edge_bps=0, edge_decay_pct=0, hours_to_resolution=null (only 2 exit candidates, all profit_capture). After fix: 26 exit candidates across 3 exit reasons (time_inefficiency=22, negative_edge=2, profit_capture=2), 39/54 positions have real edge data, Avg Current Edge=+79bp.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/debug/ui-snapshot returns 200 with lifecycle data - PASS
exit_reasons include more than profit_capture (time_inefficiency=22, negative_edge=2, profit_capture=2) - PASS
weather positions have non-zero current_edge_bps (39/54 have real edge data) - PASS
weather positions have non-null hours_to_resolution (39/54 have resolution time) - PASS
reason_distribution has multiple exit reasons - PASS
individual position evals have real edge data - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Lifecycle (26) tab shows exit candidate count > 2 - PASS
Exit Reason Distribution shows time_inefficiency (22), negative_edge (2), profit_capture (2) - PASS
Resolution Time Breakdown populated with position counts - PASS
Position table shows Edge Now column with real values (+176bp, -75bp, +252bp) - PASS
Position table shows EXIT status tags (Profit Capture, Time Inefficient) - PASS

position_meta_persistence.description: _position_meta dict populated when signals execute, survives signal eviction

gamma_api_end_date.description: endDateIso from Gamma API passed through to MarketSnapshot.end_date

bootstrap_from_classified.description: _position_meta bootstrapped from _classified market data for pre-existing positions

target_date_fallback.description: hours_to_resolution derived from target_date when market.end_date unavailable
target_date_fallback.evidence: Positions with target_date but no end_date still show resolution time

lifecycle_exit_rules.description: 4/5 exit rules now working (negative_edge, edge_decay, time_inefficiency, profit_capture). slot_rotation requires additional conditions

evidence.edge_decay: 0 candidates (no positions with >60% edge decay yet)

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented - _position_meta persists edge data when signals fill
Bootstrap mechanism correctly rebuilds metadata from _classified for pre-existing positions
target_date fallback for hours_to_resolution works when Gamma endDate unavailable
March 17 positions (15/54) show dashes because those markets expired and are no longer in Gamma API
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 weather positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified the edge and resolution-time data fix for position lifecycle. Key findings: (1) _position_meta dict now populated when signals execute (line ~1254 in weather_trader.py), persists edge_at_entry, condition_id, station_id, target_date. (2) Bootstrap from _classified markets (line ~1401) ensures pre-existing positions get metadata. (3) target_date fallback (line ~1549) derives hours_to_resolution when market.end_date unavailable. (4) 39/54 positions have real edge data - the 15 without are March 17 expired markets no longer in Gamma API. (5) Before fix: 2 exit candidates (all profit_capture). After fix: 26 exit candidates (22 time_inefficiency, 2 negative_edge, 2 profit_capture).

bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Position metadata (edge_at_entry, hours_to_resolution) was not being persisted or bootstrapped for positions in the lifecycle system
fix_applied: 1. Persist position metadata when signals execute (_position_meta dict in weather_trader.py line ~1254)
2. Pass endDateIso from Gamma API through to MarketSnapshot.end_date (weather_feeds.py line ~335)
3. Bootstrap _position_meta from _classified market data for pre-existing positions (weather_trader.py line ~1401)
4. Derive hours_to_resolution from target_date when market.end_date unavailable (weather_trader.py line ~1549)

after_fix.edge_at_entry: varies by position (0 for legacy, real for new)
